_note: Variance-reduction test: PU7_BalancedLR + grad-accum=4. PG loss is variance-dominated; 1 CS per step is pathological. 5000 opt steps × 4 accum = 20k forward passes (33% more than PU7). Tests whether the bandit signal is buried in noise.

Anti-collapse test: PU7_BalancedLR + entropy_coef 0.01→0.05 + uniform_mix 0→0.10. Encoder's top-1 scores collapse to [0.20, 0.25] band. Higher entropy + 10% uniform mix should force wider score distribution. If L@10 holds and backtest at T=0.23 trades MORE, score calibration improved.

PU10 broke 0.167 at step 9000 — best PU* ever, beats PU6v4 (0.158). Extending to 50k steps to see if it keeps climbing toward A2's 0.181 ceiling or saturates. Same flat LR (no ratios) is the winning recipe.

PU10 won with flat LR but at lr=2e-5 (conservative). Test whether lr=5e-5 (PU7's level, but WITHOUT LR ratios) extracts even more. Adam normalization should handle the head's high grad without blow-up.

Counter-architect test: same as PU7_BalancedLR but lr_ratio_lora=1.0 and lr_ratio_backbone=1.0 — flat LR across all groups, global lr=2e-5 to stay safe vs pretrain. Adam 2nd-moment normalization already auto-scales per param; the 1:0.5:0.3 ratios may be hurting backbone learning. If PU10 beats PU7, LR-ratio hand-tuning is the bottleneck.
Fix 2: re-add small ListNet anchor + lower direct_pnl_weight. Pure config change, tests if anchor restores ranking.
Fix 1: removes the top-K dead-zone via new direct_pnl_loss code (full softmax, reward-masked). Adds entropy regularizer + uniform mix.
Production candidate: LoRA-only unfreeze (smallest surface) + rank anchor + entropy + uniform mix + larger top-K + higher T. Combines all known stabilizers.
PU5 retry with new 180min timeout. Best partial-trained result: -1.93% inst. Full training may improve.
Lever #1+#2: 4-layer 8-head 1024-d_ff head (3.5x params) + NO warmstart (fresh basin). Tests if head capacity caps L@10.
Lever #7: OB encoder unfreeze (LoRA). OB features may BE the ceiling. A2 head recipe verbatim except ob_unfreeze=lora.
Lever #3: different parent checkpoint (F-13 -> F2). Tests if 0.18 ceiling is set by parent feature manifold.
Stack B1+B2: big head + OB LoRA unfreeze + no head warmstart. If they compound, this is the breakthrough.
Retry PU_RECOVERY_2 with new timeout. Full structural fix + entropy + uniform_mix + baseline_subtract.
Retry PU6 (unfreeze=all + pure-PnL) under new 180min timeout. Partial training at step 4000 showed L@10=0.1526 — best of PU family. Full training to 20000 steps may unlock.
P4: K5m + conviction sizing 10-25%. Full pipeline (mining same labels + train new ckpt + backtest on NIFTY-50 with 6bps slip).
Extended training: PU6 recipe (full encoder unfreeze + pure-PnL) to 50000 steps for proper convergence.
Extended training: PU_RECOVERY_2 recipe (pure-PnL + full regularizers + encoder_only unfreeze) to 50000 steps.
FIXED: --ob-unfreeze all (actually unfreezes main encoder + OB encoder + fusion). Previous PU6v* runs were head-only due to CLI flag misrouting.
FIXED: --ob-unfreeze all + bandit+entropy+uniform+baseline_subtract recipe. Proper encoder unfreeze this time.

ML architect 2026-05-14 recipe: head:lora:back=1:0.5:0.3 ratios, lr=5e-5, focal/rank anchors restored, cosine decay to 5%, weight_decay=0.01, grad_clip=1.0, head_dropout=0.2, 15k steps, eval every 1000.
Variant: even higher backbone ratio (0.5) to ensure backbone learns faster. Otherwise identical to PU7_BalancedLR.
Frontier 1: percentile entry gate (top 5% of cross-section). Pairs with Curve F. Symlinks A2 ckpt.
Frontier 1 variant: stricter pct gate at top 3%.
Frontier 5 (compound): top 3% pct AND absolute > 0.10. Plus k=2 + curve. Highest-conviction trades only.
Breakthrough: T=0.23 + Curve F + score_rerank K=3 on A2 ckpt. Retail = -0.68% (best retail result by 9pp). Symlinks A2 ckpt.
Less strict variant: T=0.22 (n=616 vs T=0.23's n=27). Tests middle ground.
P3: T23 ckpt + h_max=120min (vs 60) on backtest. Longer hold for slow-developing winners. A2 ckpt symlink.
P3 variant: T22 + extended hold. More trades than T23 but same h_max=120.
